fields.label: Store label
fields.description: Optional display name override for imported REWE receipts.

fields.label: Headless sync
fields.description: Run sync in headless browser mode after bootstrap.

fields.label: Record limit
fields.description: Optional per-run cap for discovered REWE receipts and orders.

fields.label: Online detail limit
fields.description: Optional cap for detailed online-order page fetches per run.

fields.label: Import storage-state file
fields.description: Optional path to an existing Playwright storage-state JSON file to import instead of logging in through automation.

fields.label: Use live Chrome tab
fields.description: Drive the already-authenticated normal Chrome REWE tab directly on macOS instead of replaying session state into a separate automation browser.

fields.label: Use running Chrome session
fields.description: Export REWE cookies from the currently logged-in local Chrome profile and verify them before opening any fallback browser.

fields.label: Import Chrome profile
fields.description: Import an already logged-in local Chrome profile instead of solving REWE login in a fresh automation browser.

fields.label: Chrome user-data dir
fields.description: Optional Chrome user-data directory for profile import. Defaults to the platform-standard Chrome path when available.

fields.label: Chrome profile name
fields.description: Chrome profile directory name to import, for example Default or Profile 1.

onboarding.title: Log into REWE in normal Chrome first
onboarding.summary: Before you use Set up, open the REWE website in your normal Chrome profile, sign in there, and leave the logged-in REWE tab open. The connector then imports that authenticated Chrome session instead of asking you to solve the REWE login in a fresh automation browser.
onboarding.expected_speed: Usually quick once REWE is already open and logged in in normal Chrome.
onboarding.caution: If REWE expires the saved session later, open Chrome again, sign into REWE again, leave the tab open, and then rerun Set up.

steps.title: Open Chrome and sign into REWE
steps.description: Use your everyday Chrome profile, open the REWE website, and finish email/password plus the emailed code there.

steps.title: Leave the logged-in REWE tab open
steps.description: Keep the REWE account tab open in Chrome so the connector can import the authenticated session from it.

steps.title: Run Set up in the connector
steps.description: Return to the connector card and run Set up. The connector first tries to reuse the logged-in Chrome session before opening any fallback browser flow.

steps.title: If it expires later, rerun the same flow
steps.description: If sync stops working days or weeks later, open Chrome, sign into REWE again, leave the tab open, and press Set up again.

steps.title: Future syncs reuse the saved session
steps.description: Later imports reuse the saved REWE session until REWE expires it and a fresh Chrome reauth is needed.
